rev 2.1.1

Pages

Add Widget

⚠ Before you start: ECU Connect rejects dashboards with the wrong Vehicle ID (error: Unknown vehicle ID). The Vehicle dropdown lists every ID known to the editor, but the app only accepts the exact Gen-specific variant for your car (e.g. NissanVR30TTGen1b, not the deprecated NissanVR30TT).
To get the right ID: open ECU Connect on your phone, export/save the default dashboard it created for your car, then click Open .edf here. The editor will read the correct Vehicle ID from that file — keep it as-is when you save your custom dashboard.
